chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH AT KARACHI CP D 2509 of 2021 ________________________________________________________________ Date Order with signature(s) of Judge(s) 1. For orders on office objection No.10. 2. For hearing of CMA No.10793/2021. 3. For hearing of main case. 26.02.2025 Mr. Ovais Ali Shah, advocate for the petitioner. Mr. Muhammad Tahir Khalil Dogar, advocate holding brief for Mr. Muhammad Khalil Dogar, advocate for the respondent. Ms. Alizeh Bashir, Assistant Attorney General. Per learned counsel, finalization of assessment is pending due to this petition. He seeks that the Department may be directed to finalize the assessment after providing opportunity of hearing to the petitioner and pending the aforesaid no further coercive action shall be taken against the petitioner. Learned counsel for the Respondent department has no cavil to the aforesaid and states that the petition may be disposed of aforesaid in the said terms. Order accordingly. Judge Judge Khuhro/PA
